title: Bare Bones Cute Pumpkin
description: Cute carved pumpkin with Bare Bones style ! 🎃
body:
![Bare Bones Cute Pumpkin logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24447f138bf7bb43a0924000f9089fd28082a866.png)
-----------

This pack is a Bare Bones version of [Cute Pumpkin](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cute-pumpkin) !

It replaces default carved pumpkins to cute looking ones !

I recommend using [No Resource Pack Warnings](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-resource-pack-warnings)
